raw_consumer_statement:
Merchant : Macys Transaction Date : XXXX XXXX, XXXX  Amount : XXXX Order Number : # XXXX Tracking Shipped with UPS Tracking # XXXX Delivery Date : XX/XX/year> I am filing a complaint regarding a denied credit card dispute. 

I purchased an item from Macys and had it shipped to my address, clearly specifying XXXX XXXX However, the package was not delivered to my apartment unit. Instead, it was left unattended in a public lobby area.

The item was subsequently stolen because it was not delivered to a secure location. The merchant claims the item was delivered based on a photo, but the photo only shows delivery to the lobby, not to my apartment door.

I disputed this transaction with Citibank, but my claim was denied solely based on delivery confirmation. This does not reflect proper delivery to the specified address.

This is not a theft claim. This is a failure to deliver to the correct location as required in the transaction.

I am requesting that Citibank re-investigate this case and issue a refund for the transaction.

I have attempted to resolve this multiple times without success.
